title: Make every cache key tenant-aware
description: Include the tenant in cache keys so a cached value computed for one tenant is never served to another.
body: Use when adding caching to any tenant-scoped data or response. Do not cache by a key that omits the tenant. Actions: prefix or compose cache keys with the tenant id; verify shared caches cannot collide across tenants; invalidate per tenant. Validation signals include a test where tenant A's cached response is never returned to tenant B for the same logical key. Risk boundary: a tenant-blind cache key leaks one tenant's data to another and is easy to introduce accidentally, so make tenant part of the key and treat a miss of this rule as a leak.
